news.headline: Bybit USDT Festival offers 1.5 million USDT in prizes, celebrating financial innovation and engaging diverse users.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on March 12, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency globally, is commemorating financial innovation through the Bybit USDT Festival, which consists of various events designed for a broad range of users. Spanning from Bybit Card holders to experienced traders, individuals utilizing Bybit and members of the community are actively participating in the celebrations.

news.headline: Abu Dhabi firm MGX invests $2B in Binance for stablecoins, marking a major deal in industry. Binance claims over 260M users.
news.summary: Abu Dhabi-based investment firm MGX has made a $2 billion investment in cryptocurrency exchange Binance, one of the largest funding deals in the industry's history. This marks MGX's first foray into the cryptocurrency sector, focusing on emerging technology. Binance, the world's largest crypto exchange, has over 260 million registered users and offers 466 cryptocurrencies. The cryptocurrency venture capital funding is on the rise, with $1.11 billion raised by 137 companies in February alone, and a projected total funding of over $18 billion in 2025. Positive regulatory developments and favorable financing conditions are driving this growth. Despite a challenging macro environment, conditions are expected to improve with accelerating business cycles and increased global liquidity.

news.headline: Wang & Lee Group plans to distribute cryptocurrency dividends to shareholders based on profits and retained earnings.
news.summary: Hong Kong, 12 March 2025 - Wang & Lee Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: WLGS) announced plans to issue a cryptocurrency dividend to its shareholders once profits are achieved and dependent on retained earnings as per the Company’s audited financial statements released on 4 March 2025.

news.headline: MicroTransponder Inc. raises $65M for Vivistim to aid chronic stroke recovery, leading the industry.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on March 12, 2025, MicroTransponder®, Inc. revealed the closing of a $65 million Series F funding. The company, a notable player in the stroke industry, is revolutionizing stroke care with its FDA-approved Vivistim® Paired VNS™ System. This financing, led by a US-based investor, marks a significant milestone in the company's growth.

news.headline: Wildcat Midstream expands Helper, Utah terminal to boost export of unique wax crude oil to U.S. Gulf Coast. Current capacity: 42,000 barrels per...
news.summary: In March 12, 2025, Wildcat Midstream initiated the expansion of its terminal in Helper, Utah, aiming to boost the export capacity of Uinta Basin's distinctive yellow and black wax crude oil to the U.S. Gulf Coast. The terminal in Helper currently has the capability to load 42,000 barrels per shipment.

news.headline: Greenland's unexpected election outcome may impact Trump's strategies. Read more about it.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was disclosed that the company's revenue for the second quarter of the year reached $5.7 million, surpassing analyst expectations by 12%. Additionally, their net profit margin expanded to 8%, a sharp increase from the previous quarter. The company's total assets stand at $25 million, indicating a healthy financial position. Furthermore, their market share grew by 5% in the last quarter, solidifying their position in the industry. This impressive performance showcased their ability to adapt to market dynamics and capitalize on emerging opportunities.

news.headline: European battery manufacturer Northvolt files for bankruptcy in Sweden, devastating hopes to rival Asian competitors.
news.summary: Following its bankruptcy filing in Sweden, a company is set to sell its assets, marking a setback for Europe's efforts to compete with Asian competitors. The sale is expected to involve significant assets and is a blow to Europe's industrial sector.

news.headline: Kohls beats Q4 earnings,but disappoints in guidance. Analyst cuts price target from $13 to $10. 2025 outlook below expectations.
news.summary: Kohls Corp (NYSE:KSS) experienced a sharp decline in early trading following the release of its fourth-quarter results. The company successfully managed its SG&A expenses and exceeded earnings expectations, although it fell short on gross margin. Analyst Dana Telsey of Telsey Advisory Group maintained a Market Perform rating but reduced the price target from $13 to $10. Despite the earnings beat, Kohls provided a 2025 outlook well below market expectations. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Global High Torque Stepper Motor Market set to reach US$2.1 Billion by 2035 with 5.3% CAGR growth driven by automation and IoT integration.
news.summary: The Global High Torque Stepper Motor Industry is thriving, with a value of US$1.1 billion in 2024 and a projected 5.3% CAGR up to 2035, reaching US$2.1 billion. Demand is driven by applications like CNC machines, robotics, and medical imaging, benefitting from precise motion control. Technological advancements, especially in hybrid motors and integrated drives, are spurring growth. The market faces challenges like overheating and competition from servo motors, but innovations in control algorithms and thermal management are being pursued. Key players include Nidec Corporation, MinebeaMitsumi Inc., and Oriental Motor Co., Ltd. Market drivers include automation and robotics demand, specifically in Industry 4.0 and healthcare applications. Notable developments include Kollmorgen's POWERMAX II® M and P Series stepper motors and Nanotec's ASA5618 model. Moon's Industries expanded production capacity in Vietnam. This sector's future involves increasing adoption in automation and medical applications, revolutionizing high-performance motion solutions.

news.headline: Denmark's gift card market set to reach $1.15 billion in 2025, with 7.5% annual growth rate. CAGR of 8.3% during 2020-2024.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on the Denmark Gift Card and Incentive Card market projects significant growth dynamics. It is expected to increase by 7.5% annually, reaching a value of US$1.15 billion by 2025. From 2020 to 2024, the Danish gift card market saw strong advancement with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.3%. This positive trend is anticipated to persist, indicating a flourishing market ahead. The report is available on ResearchAndMarkets.com for further insights.

news.headline: Liberty Star Minerals hires Mr. Steve Rivera as consulting geologist to lead Red Rock Canyon and Hay Mountain Projects in AZ.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona, on March 12, 2025, Liberty Star Minerals (OTCQB: LBSR) has bolstered its team to expedite the progress of its main gold and copper exploration endeavors. The company has officially brought onboard Mr. Steve Rivera, a proficient consulting geologist and USSEC S-K 1300 Qualified Person, to assume key geological management responsibilities for the Red Rock Canyon (RRC) and Hay Mountain Projects. These projects are located in a region renowned for substantial porphyry copper-gold-molybdenum deposits, spanning from central Arizona to northern Mexico.

news.headline: Crypto-stealing malware by Lazarus hits fresh JavaScript packages. Cyber researchers identify matching TTPs in the attack.
news.summary: A cybersecurity research stated that the TTPs seen in a recent npm attack closely match those used by Lazarus, a well-known cybercriminal group. This correlation indicates similarities between the attack and Lazarus's tactics.

news.headline: Trump calls the latest inflation numbers 'very good news.'
Milan Capital Management and Arc Capital Partners secure lease with dd's Discounts for The Plant Shopping Center in San Jose, California, advancing its revitalization.
news.summary: A new addition has been announced at The Plant Shopping Center in San Jose, California. Milan Capital Management and Arc Capital Partners revealed that dd's DISCOUNTS, a value-focused retailer, will be joining the lineup. The announcement was made on March 12, 2025. This development will enhance the diversity of offerings at the shopping center, providing customers with more options.	dd's DISCOUNTS is known for its affordable pricing and diverse product range. This move is expected to attract more shoppers to The Plant Shopping Center and boost foot traffic. The partnership between Milan and Arc to bring dd's DISCOUNTS onboard reflects their commitment to providing a dynamic shopping experience.

news.headline: Equitable Bank's PAS for fiscal 2024 released, showcases innovation and inclusion in Canadian banking.
news.summary: Equitable Bank, known as Canada's Challenger Bank™, unveiled its Public Accountability Statement (PAS) for the fiscal year 2024 today in Toronto. The document emphasizes the bank's dedication to assisting marginalized communities and pushing for enhancements to the Canadian banking sector. This report showcases Equitable Bank's efforts in social responsibility and mentions various initiatives undertaken to promote financial inclusivity. The PAS highlights specific figures related to the bank's outreach programs, such as the number of individuals served and the funds allocated to community projects.

news.headline: US immigration detention maxed out at 47,600 detainees - Senior Ice Official.
Melissa & Doug wins Preschool Toy of the Year Award for Sort, Stock, Select Wooden Vending Machine at TOTY Awards Gala.
news.summary: In Wilton, Connecticut on March 12, 2025, popular brand Melissa & Doug was honored with the Preschool Toy of the Year (TOTY) Award for their Sort, Stock, Select Wooden Vending Machine Play Set. Regarded as the top brand for wooden and sustainable toys among preschoolers, Melissa & Doug's achievement was announced at the 2025 Toy Foundation's TOTY Awards Gala. This recognition highlights their success in creating engaging and innovative toys for children.

news.headline: Inventor from Sydney creates BELT MATE to protect stomach from belt buckle discomfort.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2025, an inventor from Sydney, NSW, Australia, discussed the creation of a new belt accessory called the BELT MATE. This innovative product aims to shield the stomach from potential harm caused by rough or sharp belt buckles. The inventor mentioned that the design of the BELT MATE effectively prevents the buckle from moving upwards. This invention offers a solution for individuals who may experience discomfort or injury from traditional belt styles.

news.headline: D-Wave demonstrates quantum supremacy over classical supercomputers in solving complex problems.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) disclosed a significant achievement in the quantum computing field. The company, known for its quantum computing systems, software, and services and as the first commercial provider of quantum computers globally, revealed a remarkable advancement showcased in the respected journal Science. Their annealing quantum computer surpassed the capabilities of one of the world's top classical supercomputers in tackling intricate magnetic materials simulation challenges.

news.headline: Exein partners with Supermicro to revolutionize embedded security in IoT, shaping future safeguards.
news.summary: Exein, a cybersecurity firm specializing in embedded IoT, has collaborated with Supermicro to revolutionize embedded security. This partnership aims to shape the future of IoT security by combining Exein's expertise with Supermicro's capabilities.

news.headline: HPQ will start commercial production of fumed silica in Canada by Q4 2025, becoming the first domestic supplier.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2025, HPQ is set to commence commercial production of fumed silica through its pilot plant. This initiative marks HPQ as Canada's inaugural domestic supplier of this product.

news.headline: Curly Culture and Society 18 join forces in strategic partnership to empower natural hair creators. Celebrating diversity in beauty.
news.summary: Curly Culture, a leading digital platform for multicultural beauty knowledge established by Ava Pearl, has revealed a significant collaboration with Society 18, a prominent influencer management and marketing agency specializing in multiethnic influencers and talent. This partnership, headed by two female-led entities, aims to promote natural hair beauty and elevate voices in multicultural beauty on various channels. The alliance between Curly Culture and Society 18 signifies a strategic move to combine their expertise and reach a wider audience.

news.headline: Global market for Bioenergy with CCS to hit $676.6 million by 2033, growing at 12.3% CAGR, driven by climate change mitigation efforts.
news.summary: The rising global focus on combatting climate change has led to a surge in demand for Bioenergy with Carbon Capture and Storage (BECCS). This technology is pivotal in aiding nations to achieve their net-zero emissions targets. The urgency to adopt negative-emission technologies has intensified due to the increasing commitment worldwide to mitigate climate change.

news.headline: MGX makes a $2 billion investment in Binance, the largest in a crypto company, paid in stablecoin, and first institutional one.
news.summary: Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency company, has received a monumental $2 billion investment. This investment stands out for several reasons: it is the largest ever made into a crypto company, tops the charts as the biggest investment paid in stablecoin, and marks the first institutional investment secured by Binance. This significant influx of funds is a game-changer and highlights the growing prominence of cryptocurrency enterprises in the global economy.

news.headline: Dream Residential REIT appoints TD Securities Inc. as financial advisor for strategic review process to maximize unitholder value.
news.summary: In Toronto, Dream Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: DRR.U, TSX: DRR.UN) revealed that the Board of Trustees has assigned TD Securities Inc. as the financial advisor for the REIT. This move is part of their strategic review process aimed at determining various strategic alternatives to enhance unitholder value. Dream Residential REIT aims to maximize the benefits for its investors through this Strategic Review.

news.headline: Measles cases in 12 states, norovirus outbreaks on cruise ships spark concerns, leading to travel insurance updates.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, as of March 12, 2025, the United States is experiencing an increase in measles cases, with outbreaks confirmed in a minimum of 12 states. Additionally, norovirus incidents on cruise ships are on the rise, raising worries among travelers regarding the spread of infectious diseases. The situation is escalating, underscoring the importance of vigilance and preventive measures to combat the spread of these illnesses.

news.headline: Malaysia Buy Now Pay Later market expected to reach $2.52 billion in 2025 - 15.1% annual growth - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Malaysia Buy Now Pay Later Business and Investment Opportunities Databook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report forecasts that the BNPL payment market in Malaysia is projected to expand by 15.1% annually, reaching a value of US$2.52 billion by 2025. The market experienced significant growth from 2021 to 2024, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) not specified in the text.

news.headline: Australian BMX rider Boyd Hilder, 29, wins third gold at Simple Session 2025 in Estonia. Show-stopping victory.
news.summary: Boyd Hilder, a talented BMX rider from Australia, put on a spectacular display to win in Estonia. The 29-year-old athlete hailing from Gold Coast secured an impressive victory at Simple Session 2025. This achievement was recognized and celebrated by Monster Energy.

news.headline: Dave Asprey to host Biohacking Conference in Austin from May 28-30, 2025; new book 'Heavily Meditated' to launch.
news.summary: A forthcoming book titled "Heavily Meditated" is gearing up to be released alongside the Biohacking Conference in Austin, Texas on May 28-30, 2025. Organized by the renowned figure in biohacking, Dave Asprey, known as the "Father of Biohacking," this conference is the most awaited event in the field. It will be held at the prestigious Fairmont Hotel.

news.headline: KTL Solutions debuts new user-friendly website to help businesses navigate services and resources better. #ITConsulting #MicrosoftPartner #WebsiteRedesign.
news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland, on March 12, 2025, a renowned IT consulting company and Microsoft Partner, KTL Solutions, launched its revamped website. The new site is tailored to enhance user experience, making it simpler for businesses in search of information to navigate.

news.headline: $78 million awarded to workers with fatal silicosis due to inhaling silica dust from artificial stone; landmark legal victories.
news.summary: In a recent development on March 12, 2025, Brayton Purcell LLP successfully achieved two significant legal triumphs for workers in artificial stone fabrication. These individuals are afflicted with accelerated silicosis, a terminal lung condition resulting from exposure to silica dust. This incurable disease is linked to inhaling such particles emanating from artificial stone. The victories mark a crucial milestone for the affected workers and highlight the severity of the situation.

news.headline: Absolute Security names Harold Rivas as Chief Information Security Officer, bringing over 20 years of cybersecurity experience.
news.summary: In Seattle, Absolute Security, a prominent enterprise resilience company, has appointed Harold Rivas as the new Chief Information Security Officer (CISO). Rivas brings over 20 years of experience in cybersecurity and demonstrated leadership to his new role. He will be responsible for managing worldwide cybersecurity and information technology at the company, covering security for products and services, threat management, cyber risk and compliance, as well as security operations. The addition of Rivas to the team signifies a move towards bolstering security measures at Absolute Security.

news.headline: AB DAO expands globally, now listed on BitMart. $AB to be listed on Lbank, Biconomy. Future of Web3 discussed in HTX AMA.
news.summary: Today, on March 12, 2025, AB DAO made an announcement regarding the official listing of their digital asset, $AB, on BitMart. This move aims to boost global liquidity and increase ecosystem influence. Additionally, $AB is set to be listed on other platforms such as Lbank and Biconomy in the near future. The listing on BitMart presents a significant opportunity for AB DAO to expand its reach to a wider audience and enhance its market presence.

news.headline: Kazakhstan plans to cut oil production to comply with OPEC+.
Inventor from Benton, La., develops Overflow Fuel Catcher for boats to prevent spills; aims for fuel reuse.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2025, an inventor from Benton, Louisiana, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the OVERFLOW FUEL CATCHER. The innovative product aims to tackle the issue of gasoline spills during boat refueling. The inventor highlighted the automatic feature of the device that captures and contains fuel for potential reuse. This invention is set to make a positive impact by reducing water pollution from fuel spills and promoting sustainability in boating practices.

news.headline: SEC whistleblower launches TheWhistleIsBlown.com, submits "This Nightmare Is Out of Control" to SEC Crypto Task Force.
news.summary: A recently launched website offers comprehensive information, including news, updates, and a written submission titled "This Nightmare Is Out of Control" that was directly sent to the SEC Crypto Task Force. The website is headquartered in HOWEY-IN-THE-HILLS, Florida, and the news was disclosed on March 12, 2025. The submission was made following the Freeing Howey Investment Contract Summit gathering, which attracted a significant number of participants and stakeholders.

news.headline: Bank of Russia plans to allow qualified investors to buy/sell crypto under new legal regime, following Putin's directives.
news.summary: The Bank of Russia has suggested a new three-year experimental legal framework that would permit a select group of qualified investors to trade cryptocurrencies. This proposal, announced in line with President Vladimir Putin's instructions, is aimed at "particularly qualified" investors - individuals holding over 100 million rubles ($1.02 million) in securities and deposits or with an annual income of more than 50 million rubles ($510,000), along with companies already designated as qualified investors. This departure from Russia's past hesitancy towards adopting Bitcoin as a reserve asset was outlined in a report submitted to the Russian government.

news.headline: Kazakhstan Energy Ministry: We exceeded the OPEC+ quota in February due to the expansion of the Tengiz Oil Field.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: A rise in people's medium and long-term inflation expectations would certainly be a big warning sign for us.
WillScot's subsidiary to seek Consents from holders of 6.625% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 and 7.375% Senior Secured Notes due 2031.
news.summary: Phoenix, March 12, 2025 - WillScot Holdings Corporation, a leader in temporary space solutions, announced that its subsidiary Williams Scotsman, Inc. will be seeking consents from holders of its 6.625% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 and 7.375% Senior Secured Notes due 2031. The Record Date for this solicitation is March 11, 2025. The purpose is to amend certain provisions of the indentures governing the Existing Notes. WillScot is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol WSC.

news.headline: Kazakhstan Energy Ministry: Any further plans for the development of Kazakhstan's oil industry will be implemented only in strict compliance with the country's obligations and taking into account the market situation.
Kazakhstan Energy Ministry: Kazakhstan took necessary measures to compensate for the temporary increase in production.
Owen Companies acquires J&R Equipment, OK-based distributor, expanding infrastructure solutions. #Acquisition #BusinessExpansion
news.summary: ROSEMONT, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Owen Family of Companies, an industry leader in specialty equipment services for municipal, utility, and commercial clients in the U.S. and a Wynnchurch Capital portfolio venture, has confirmed the purchase of J&R Equipment, LLC. Based in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, J&R Equipment is a major provider of environmental solutions. This acquisition is a strategic move to expand Owen's reach and capabilities. The financial terms of the deal, including the specifics of the transaction and the total value, were not disclosed. The agreement aligns with Owen's growth plans and commitment to enhancing its service offerings.

news.headline: Kazakhstan Energy Ministry: The current quota overrun in February is due to technological processes.
BoC's Senior Dep. Gov. Rogers: We don't expect that the supply constraints from tariffs and the trade war will run into the same surge in demand we saw during the pandemic.
Monge & Associates opens new office in Cincinnati on April 3, 2025, led by Managing Attorney Craig Belliston.
news.summary: A law firm named Monge & Associates Injury and Accident Attorneys will be launching a new office in Cincinnati, Ohio on April 3, 2025. The establishment of this office was announced on March 12, 2025 in Atlanta. The office in Cincinnati will cater to injury victims in the area and will be overseen by Managing Attorney Craig Belliston, who is a Brigham Young University graduate.

news.headline: Vye wins Content Experience Accreditation and 2024 Impact Award from HubSpot, recognized for Technical Excellence.
news.summary: In St. Cloud, Minnesota on March 12, 2025, Vye revealed that it was granted a Content Experience Accreditation and a semi-annual 2024 Impact Award for Technical Excellence by HubSpot, a prominent CRM platform catering to growing businesses. The recognition highlighted Vye's proficiency in crafting engaging content experiences for its audience, solidifying its reputation as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: BoC's Senior Dep. Gov. Rogers: the speed of pass through and the magnitude of pass through are two of the big uncertainties.
Kazakhstan Energy Ministry: Kazakhstan is committed to the OPEC+ deal.
The Word Network will exclusively air Angie Stone's funeral service in Atlanta officiated by Bishop E. [less than 100 characters].
news.summary: The homegoing service for the iconic singer, songwriter, and trailblazer Angie Stone will be exclusively aired on The Word Network, the largest African American religious network globally. Scheduled to take place in Atlanta, the service will be overseen by Bishop E., with the broadcast set for March 12, 2025.
